data.strFullDescription:
[h2]Objective[/h2][p]You're a Ragdoll! What's the point of the game? Do what a Ragdoll is meant to do and flop, fall, or crash on to things! Don't be nervous!  [/p][h2]Sandbox[/h2][p]Build worlds for you and your ragdolls! Choose from a collection of Cannons, Black Holes, giant Fans, Ragdolls (obviously), Mines, Lasers, Cars, Jump Pads, Telepads, glass, destructible Pillars, Lasers, and more! I can't name everything cause it'd take up too many characters...
[/p][h2]World Sharing[/h2][p]Share your creations and download maps created by others from across the world![/p][h2] Ragdoll AI[/h2][p]Choose from a selection of different Ragdoll AI! Attackers, Defenders, Seekers (hide & seek), Followers, Explorers, and more! They can also traverse the worlds you build autonomously![/p][h2]Items[/h2][p]Every item in the game has properties you can adjust! Want to change how powerful the Mines are? Go for it! Want to make a Ragdoll giant!? Do it! You can use items and adjust their properties to make mazes, stunt courses, mini-games, art, at this point I'm sure you get the idea. [/p][p]
[/p][h2]Customization[/h2][p]Change the look of your Ragdoll from an assortment of skins and faces! You can also choose from a selection of skyboxes/environments! [/p][p][/p][p]This game truly gives you the [b]ultimate[/b] ragdoll experience like no other![/p]
data.strSnippet: Become a ragdoll and create your own environments in Sandbox Mode, explore worlds created by others, or just flop around your destructible sets! Fun with Ragdolls®: The Game lets you enjoy everything you love about ragdolls!
